summary: User Import and Reports Chart Zoom features testing completed. All 8 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend UI components verified working.

design_issues.screen: Import Dialog and Chart Zoom Dialog
issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning, non-blocking)

import_template_endpoint.returns: CSV file with 18 headers and sample row

features: Role assignment based on OFO Major Group

users_page_import_ui.template_button: PASS - visible in header for admin users (data-testid='download-template-btn')
users_page_import_ui.import_button: PASS - visible in header for admin users (data-testid='import-users-btn')
users_page_import_ui.import_dialog: PASS - opens with file upload, template download link, and confirm button
users_page_import_ui.import_button_disabled: PASS - correctly disabled when no file selected

reports_page_charts.expenses_by_applicant_list: PASS - displayed (no zoom, it's a list not a chart)

reports_zoom_feature.zoom_buttons: PASS - all 4 zoom buttons found (appear on hover)
reports_zoom_feature.zoom_dialog: PASS - opens with enlarged chart on click (data-testid='chart-zoom-dialog')

seed_data_creation: Test created and cleaned up TEST_import_user* test data during bulk import tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: User import and reports zoom features are fully functional. Backend endpoints /api/users/import-template and /api/users/bulk-import work correctly. UsersPage shows Template and Import buttons for admin users with working import dialog. ReportsPage displays all 5 charts with zoom buttons on 4 chart cards, and zoom dialog opens with enlarged chart.
